proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_041` increases progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable ordinary least-squares regression showed that `feature_041` was the strongest positive continuous predictor: slope +0.176502 months of `pfs_months` per 1-unit increase in `feature_041` (SE 0.000662; t=266.53; n=50000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_025` values are associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; moving from lower to higher `feature_025` decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS showed a strong negative linear association: each 1-level increase in `feature_025` was associated with -1.189668 months of `pfs_months` (SE 0.014164; t=-83.99). Mean `pfs_months` was 5.271 months at `feature_025=0`, 4.054 at `feature_025=1`, and 2.908 at `feature_025=2`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036=0`.

analyses.result_summary: A binary mean-difference/OLS analysis found that `feature_036=1` was associated with -1.352001 months lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_036=0` (SE 0.019704; t=-68.61).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_043=0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043=1` was associated with +0.972162 months higher mean `pfs_months` than `feature_043=0` in univariable OLS (SE 0.025244; t=38.51).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_056` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_056` decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS supported a negative association for `feature_056`: slope -0.073015 months of `pfs_months` per 1-unit increase in `feature_056` (SE 0.002638; t=-27.68).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_050` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_050` increases progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: Univariable OLS supported a positive association for `feature_050`: slope +0.465363 months of `pfs_months` per 1-unit increase in `feature_050` (SE 0.020344; t=22.87).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.result_summary: In univariable OLS, `feature_001=1` was associated with -0.326773 months lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_001=0` (SE 0.020740; t=-15.76).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015=0`.

analyses.result_summary: In univariable OLS, `feature_015=1` was associated with -0.305207 months lower mean `pfs_months` than `feature_015=0` (SE 0.021412; t=-14.25).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_029` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; each 1-unit increase in `feature_029` decreases progression-free survival.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_029` had a small but statistically significant negative univariable slope: -0.005346 months of `pfs_months` per 1-unit increase in `feature_029` (SE 0.000633; t=-8.44).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_066=1` have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066=0`, independent of `feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, and `feature_029`.

analyses.result_summary: After adjustment for the dominant main effects (`feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, and `feature_029`), `feature_066=1` remained associated with lower `pfs_months`; adjusted coefficient -0.355527 months (SE 0.018903; t=-18.81).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042=1` have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042=0`, independent of `feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_066`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_042=1` had a positive univariable association, but after adjustment for the dominant features its coefficient was only +0.021021 months (SE 0.022895; t=0.92), so an independent positive main effect was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Compared with `feature_025=0`, `feature_025=1` and `feature_025=2` each have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`, with `feature_025=2` having the larger decrement.

analyses.result_summary: Treating `feature_025` categorically confirmed a graded decrement. Compared with `feature_025=0`, level 1 was -1.197490 months (SE 0.008813; p<1e-300) and level 2 was -2.336092 months (SE 0.012383; p<1e-300). The reported effect estimate is the level-2 minus level-0 adjusted contrast.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is nonlinear and becomes stronger at higher `feature_041` values, yielding a positive quadratic term.

analyses.result_summary: A model with centered `feature_041` and its square found a positive quadratic term: +0.000589 months per squared centered unit (SE 0.000048; t=12.14), indicating the positive slope strengthens slightly at higher values.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `feature_056` and `pfs_months` becomes increasingly negative at higher `feature_056` values, yielding a negative quadratic term.

analyses.result_summary: A centered quadratic model for `feature_056` did not support nonlinear worsening. The quadratic term was -0.000307 months per squared centered unit (SE 0.000576; t=-0.53).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher `feature_025` values; the `feature_041` by `feature_025` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: An adjusted interaction model found a negative centered `feature_041` by `feature_025` interaction: -0.007283 months per product unit (SE 0.000569; t=-12.80). Unadjusted `feature_041` slopes were 0.1800, 0.1774, and 0.1631 within `feature_025` levels 0, 1, and 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_036=1` than among patients with `feature_036=0`; the `feature_041` by `feature_036` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: An adjusted interaction model found a negative `feature_041` by `feature_036` interaction: -0.006901 months per product unit (SE 0.000780; t=-8.85). The unadjusted `feature_041` slope was 0.1804 when `feature_036=0` and 0.1733 when `feature_036=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is stronger at higher `feature_050` values; the `feature_041` by `feature_050` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: An adjusted interaction model found a positive `feature_041` by `feature_050` interaction: +0.003876 months per product unit (SE 0.000773; t=5.01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher `feature_056` values; the `feature_041` by `feature_056` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: An adjusted interaction model found a negative `feature_041` by `feature_056` interaction: -0.000456 months per product unit (SE 0.000100; t=-4.53).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043=1` and `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `feature_001=1`; the `feature_001` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_001` by `feature_043` interaction was strongly negative: -1.631056 months (SE 0.018130; t=-89.96). Unadjusted `feature_043=1` versus 0 differences were +1.6557 months when `feature_001=0` and +0.0269 months when `feature_001=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043=1` and `pfs_months` is attenuated among patients with `feature_015=1`; the `feature_015` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_015` by `feature_043` interaction was negative: -1.461037 months (SE 0.019132; t=-76.37). Unadjusted `feature_043=1` versus 0 differences were +1.4796 months when `feature_015=0` and +0.0255 months when `feature_015=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_029` is more strongly associated with lower `pfs_months` among patients with `feature_043=1` than among patients with `feature_043=0`; the `feature_029` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_029` by `feature_043` interaction was negative: -0.025801 months per product unit (SE 0.000592; t=-43.55). Unadjusted `feature_029` slopes were -0.00047 when `feature_043=0` and -0.02574 when `feature_043=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined negative association of `feature_001=1` and `feature_015=1` with `pfs_months` is less severe than the sum of their individual negative associations; the `feature_001` by `feature_015` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_001` by `feature_015` interaction was positive: +0.511717 months (SE 0.016211; t=31.57). Unadjusted `feature_015=1` versus 0 differences were -0.4935 months when `feature_001=0` and -0.0418 months when `feature_001=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_066=1` is associated with especially lower `pfs_months` among patients with `feature_043=1`; the `feature_066` by `feature_043` interaction is negative.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_066` by `feature_043` interaction was negative: -0.989200 months (SE 0.045638; t=-21.67). Unadjusted `feature_066=1` versus 0 differences were +0.0098 months when `feature_043=0` and -1.1731 months when `feature_043=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_042=1` is associated with higher `pfs_months` primarily among patients with `feature_043=1`; the `feature_042` by `feature_043` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: Although the adjusted main effect for `feature_042` was not significant, its adjusted interaction with `feature_043` was positive: +0.888114 months (SE 0.055541; t=15.99). Unadjusted `feature_042=1` versus 0 differences were +0.0086 months when `feature_043=0` and +0.9966 months when `feature_043=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `feature_036=1` and `pfs_months` is slightly less severe at higher `feature_025` values; the `feature_025` by `feature_036` interaction is positive.

analyses.result_summary: An adjusted interaction model found a positive but modest `feature_025` by `feature_036` interaction: +0.044936 months per product unit (SE 0.011450; t=3.92). Unadjusted `feature_036=1` versus 0 differences were -1.4013, -1.3461, and -1.2701 months within `feature_025` levels 0, 1, and 2.
